description_long: This object is a military jet aircraft with a slender fuselage, sharply pointed nose, and a single vertical stabilizer at the tail. The wings are short, straight, and mounted low on the fuselage, with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral. The aircraft is painted primarily in a light gray color with 'U.S. AIR FORCE' markings and insignia on the sides and wings. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a clear, enclosed canopy. The engine is rear-mounted, with a prominent exhaust at the back, and the landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable.
description: A sleek, gray U.S. Air Force jet with a pointed nose, low-mounted straight wings, and a single rear engine. Features a forward, enclosed cockpit and prominent military markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the jet, U.S. Air Force markings, and the single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the jet exhaust, tail structure, and the straight, low-mounted wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible cockpit canopy, wing, and tail details, as well as 'USAF' markings.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical wing arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers at the base.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
